PART I I RACES
DEEP GNOMES
Athird subrace of gnomes, the deep gnomes (or svirfneblin),
live in small communities scattered in the Underdark. Unlike
the duergar and the drow, svirfneblin are as good as their
surface cousins. However, their humor and enthusiasm
are dampened by their oppressive environment, and their
inventive expertise is directed mostly toward stonework.
~

data.description: Though gnomes love jokes of kinds, puns and pranks, just dedicated lhe lo more They're as serious they are Many tasks undertake, gnomes skilled engineers, They're alchemists, tinkers, and inventors, willing to make mistakes laugh themselves in and at lhe process perfecting what they do, taking bold (sometimes foolhardy) and
You can dimly see in darkness as if it were dim light, to a range of 30 feet.
